title: Introducing InvisiClip™. Hidden hardware. Honest deck.
excerpt: POM clips on aluminum rails. Boards drop in from above. No screws on the deck surface. Powered by the GRAD® system.
heroAlt: Walnut PVC deck board hovering above two InvisiClip hidden fasteners on an aluminum rail, grooves aligned with the clips
author: American Pro

title: Where to buy American Pro on the East Coast.
excerpt: Two trusted regional partners are stocking American Pro right now. Genesee Reserve Supply for porch flooring across Western NY and the Finger Lakes, and Stonewood Products for PVC decking on Cape Cod and SE Massachusetts. Phone numbers, hours, and territory.
heroAlt: Walnut and grey PVC decking bundles being loaded onto a flatbed at an East Coast wholesale building products dealer yard at golden hour
author: American Pro

title: Made in Linden, New Jersey. Where American Pro decking is extruded.
excerpt: We mix our own PVC compound, cut our own dies, and run our own tooling for American Pro decking, porch, and mouldings. Here is what “made in Linden” actually means, and where the line is between what we extrude and what is GRAD®-licensed.
heroAlt: A walnut wood-grain PVC deck board exiting an extrusion die head and traveling along stainless cooling rollers inside an American Pro production line in Linden, New Jersey
author: American Pro
